# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This is currently a POC repository. Security fixes target the latest `main` branch.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open public issues for security reports.

Report privately to project maintainers with:

- impact summary
- affected files/paths
- reproduction steps
- suggested mitigation

Maintainers will acknowledge within 72 hours and provide remediation timeline.

## Scope Notes

This project is chipnet/testnet-focused. Production deployments require additional hardening and independent audit.
